query: Can you prepare a travel plan for a group of 7 departing from Appleton to Charlotte? This will be a 3-day trip from March 18th to March 20th, 2022. Our budget for this trip is $9,500. Please ensure our accommodations allow visitors, as per the house rules.

plan.transportation: Flight F3796721, from Appleton to Charlotte
plan.attraction: NASCAR Hall of Fame;Levine Museum of the New South;The Mint Museum;

plan.accommodation: Stunning 5 BR Townhouse with Chef's Kitchen #1028, Charlotte

plan.attraction: Discovery Place Science;UNC Charlotte Botanical Gardens;Billy Graham Library;
